candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over subtotal/total lines.
Total revenue subtotal that may be used in some periods, but less preferred than the direct revenue line.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue line changes over time; prefer 'Revenue' and fall back to 'Total Revenue'.

candidates.why: Direct cost of sales / cost of revenues line.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total cost of revenues line as COGS.

candidates.why: Could be an SG&A component, but an explicit SG&A row exists.
Explicit SG&A/overhead line and therefore preferred as the sole selection.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement SG&A expense row.

variables.notes: Per SG&A hierarchy, because an explicit populated SG&A row exists, selected only 'General and administrative expenses' and excluded separate components like share-based compensation.
No research and development expense line is identifiable on the provided statements.

candidates.why: Direct interest-related expense line, but only appears in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest-related, but supplemental and too narrow to represent total interest expense.

variables.notes: Candidate list appears to miss the primary reported interest/finance cost line used in several years: 'Finance expense'. Included it first as the best available reported interest/finance line, with 'Interest expense and bank charges' as fallback. Manual review recommended because 'Finance expense' may include non-interest finance items in some periods. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Finance expense

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to common shareholders
candidates.why: Preferred owner/shareholder equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to common shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent/common shareholder equity line, consistent with excluding NCI from BE.

candidates.row_label: Net loss and comprehensive loss attributable to non-controlling interest
candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not a balance sheet minority interest stock variable.
Not preferred because MIB should come from balance sheet when available.
Preferred balance sheet minority interest / NCI line.
Alternative balance sheet minority interest label.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI labels as a priority list. BE is mapped to shareholder/common equity, so this avoids double counting.
